author: lora_forge/crew/forge
text:
## Epic Task Breakdown Complete

### Scope A: OMP MCP Integration
- **cm-2j5.1** (P1): Add context-mode to OMP's .mcp.json — foundational config
- **cm-2j5.2** (P1): End-to-end verification of all 7 tools in OMP sessions → blocked by .1

### Scope B: Prompt Engineering & Routing
- **cm-2j5.3** (P2): System prompt for Qwen to route to context-mode tools → blocked by .2
- **cm-2j5.4** (P2): OMP lifecycle hook for tool routing reminders → blocked by .3

### Scope C: Persistent Knowledge
- **cm-2j5.5** (P2): Persistent FTS5 databases (file-backed, WAL mode, named DBs)
- **cm-2j5.6** (P3): Convoy-level pre-indexing at stage time → blocked by .5
- **cm-2j5.7** (P2): Polecat boot formula using batch_execute → blocked by .5

### Dependency Graph
A.1 → A.2 → B.1 → B.2 | C.1 → C.2, D.1

### Critical Path
A.1 → A.2 → B.1 is the critical path for basic OMP support. C.1 is independent and can run in parallel.

### Success Metrics
- >5x context savings for OMP sessions
- Polecat orientation <10% of context budget (from 30-40%)
- No regression in Claude Code performance
